data.name: A Night With: Emily
data.detailed_description: Embark on a short journey in "A Night With: Emily", an adult-only, erotic visual novel that brings a unusual twist to intimate storytelling. After your college friend send you a intimate photo, she would do everything she can so you delete the image. This game focuses on a single, intense night of exploration and discovery, where every interaction with Spirit reveals deeper layers of the story.
data.about_the_game: Embark on a short journey in "A Night With: Emily", an adult-only, erotic visual novel that brings a unusual twist to intimate storytelling. This game focuses on a single, intense night of exploration and discovery, where every interaction with Spirit reveals deeper layers of the story.

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 日文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows Vista, 7, 8, 10, 11
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Full HD monitor is recommended
